name: k-skill-rhwp
description: Node-side HWP editing CLI that wraps @rhwp/core WASM bindings for the rhwp-edit and rhwp-advanced skills

scripts.lint: node --check src/index.js && node --check src/cli.js && node --check src/wasm-init.js && node --check bin/k-skill-rhwp.js && node --check test/index.test.js && node --check test/cli.test.js
